Uses of Class
model.Answer

Packages that use Answer
Package
Description
databasePart1
Contains the database access layer for the Student QA application.
logic
Contains business logic and utility classes for the Student QA application.
model
Contains the core data model classes for the Student QA application.
pages
Contains all JavaFX UI page classes for the Student QA application.
